task_completion.description: Open and read the taxpayer's documents from the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a file explorer, text editor, or document viewer open to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\nair\ displaying Priya Nair's tax information.

task_completion.description: Enter the taxpayer's personal information into the tax software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tax software (e.g., StudioTax) open with 'Priya Nair' entered as the name and 'BC' or 'British Columbia' selected as the province of residence.

task_completion.description: Enter T5 staking rewards, T777 home office expenses, and RRSP contributions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tax software forms showing $1,840 entered as T5 interest income, $2,288 entered for T777 employment expenses (home office), and $5,500 entered for RRSP contributions.

task_completion.description: Enter cryptocurrency capital gains on Schedule 3 while applying the superficial loss rule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Schedule 3 (Capital Gains) form in the tax software showing entries for ETH, BTC, and MATIC. Evidence that the SOL loss was treated as a superficial loss (either omitted, zeroed out, or explicitly adjusted).

task_completion.description: Save the completed tax return to the correct directory with the specified filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box or file explorer window confirming the file is named 'priya_nair.24t' and is being saved in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the tax software's graphical user interface to complete the return.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show active interaction with the tax software (e.g., StudioTax) GUI, rather than a terminal window running a script to generate the .24t file.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass data entry by copying a pre-existing completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands like 'cp' or 'mv' moving a pre-made .24t file into the target directory.

integrity.description: The agent manually navigated and entered data into the appropriate tax forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Sequential screenshots showing the agent clicking through different forms/tabs (e.g., Schedule 3, T5, RRSP) and typing in the values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer is Priya Nair, resident of BC. Key tax return data to verify in the software: 1) Schedule 3 capital gains for ETH, BTC, MATIC. 2) A denied superficial loss for SOL (ITA s.54). 3) T5 staking rewards of $1,840 entered as interest. 4) T777 home office deductions of $2,288. 5) RRSP contribution of $5,500. The final file must be saved exactly as 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\priya_nair.24t'.
